config.missing_version: Config file at {file} has no `version` field. v1 requires `version = 1`.
config.version_mismatch: Config schema version mismatch in {file}: found {found}, expected {expected}.
config.version_mismatch.fix: Run `agora doctor --explain-config` to see migration steps, or read https://github.com/lazydevz-inc/agora/blob/main/docs/infra/config.md#migrations
config.threshold_inversion: Section {section} thresholds must satisfy ok < warn < fail. Saw {values}.
config.invalid_toml: Failed to parse TOML in {file} (line {line}, column {column}): {parser_message}

llm.auth_failed.fix: Run `claude login` to authenticate, or set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for SDK fallback.
llm.no_runner_available: Neither claude CLI nor ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is available.
llm.no_runner_available.fix: Install Claude Code (https://claude.com/claude-code) OR set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

probe.unknown_id: Unknown probe id `{probe_id}` referenced in [probes].disabled or [probes].forced.

gate.gate_5_fail: Gate 5 (Alignment Check) failed: drift score {drift_score} exceeds threshold {threshold}.

io.editor_unavailable.fix: Set $EDITOR env var to your preferred editor (vim, nano, code -w, etc.) or install one of vim/nano/vi.

internal.uncaught: Internal error: {detail}. This is a bug in Agora.
internal.uncaught.fix: Crash report written to {crash_file}. Please file at github.com/lazydevz-inc/agora/issues with the file attached.
internal.invariant_violation: Internal invariant violation: {detail}. This is a bug in Agora.

global.help_intro: Agora — agent harness where ancient philosophers gather to refine intent into reality.

version.json_warning_no_runtime_check: Runtime probes (claude_cli_present, pnpm_version) skipped — full env scan available via `agora doctor`.

doctor.section_detected_not_bundled: Probes detected but not bundled (community PR welcome)

status.no_session: No active Agora session in this directory.
status.suggest_new: Run `agora new <name>` to start a session.

new.next_phase_minus_1: Next: `agora bracket` to run Husserl Phase −1 (greenfield default).
new.next_phase_1: `agora resume` to skip directly to Phase 1 intake (brownfield default).

bracket.ask_intent: What do you want to build (or change)?
bracket.ask_experience: Before what to build — describe the EXPERIENCE that prompted this.
bracket.constructing: Constructing alternatives via Claude (one LLM call)...
bracket.ask_surprising: Was there a moment where you noticed an assumption you didn't know you had?

efficient.intro: Aristotle efficient round — Phase 2, round 4 (final Aristotle cause)
efficient.q_who: Who is involved? (solo / team of N / specific roles)

material.context_summary: Loaded {project_type} scan ({stack_count} detected stack entries). Asking material questions: stack + data shape + infrastructure.
material.q_confirm_stack:
Detected stack: {detected}

Accept as-is, or list additions/removals? (use 'ok' to accept verbatim)
material.q_tech_stack_fresh: What's the tech stack? (language + framework + key libs, comma-separated)
material.q_data_shape: What's the shape of the primary data? (one paragraph)
material.q_infrastructure: Where does it run? (deploy / runtime / hosting, one paragraph)

form.context_summary: Loaded telos: "{telos}". Asking form questions: shape that carries this telos + irreducible parts.
form.q_essential_structure: Given your telos ("{telos}"), what shape carries it? (high-level structure, not feature list)
form.q_irreducible_parts: What components are essential to the telos, not decoration? (comma-separated)
form.feature_list_warning: Detected feature list rather than structural components: "{detected}". {reason}
form.q_feature_list_refinement: Re-ask: what's the structural shape, not the catalog of features?

telos.context_summary: Loaded Phase 1 intake ({word_count} words). Asking the 3 telos questions in order — verb-phrases about served good only.
telos.q_served_good: What good does it serve? (Name the goodness, not the activity.)
telos.q_failure_signal: How will you know if you built the thing but it failed at its purpose?
telos.q_noun_phrase_refinement: Re-ask: what good does that noun serve? (Verb-phrase, not artifact name.)

intake.prompt_brownfield:
What would you like to work on?

ⓘ I've already read your project signals ({ingested_doc_list}). Don't re-explain what the project is — tell me what you want to do here today.

Press Enter alone to open $EDITOR for longer thoughts.
intake.prompt_greenfield:
What would you like to build?

ⓘ This looks like a fresh start. Tell me as much as you can — what it is, why you want it, what shape you imagine. The more you say now, the fewer questions later.

Press Enter alone to open $EDITOR for longer thoughts.
intake.empty_reprompt: Editor returned empty. Need at least one sentence — try again.
intake.reprompt_short: One sentence describing what you want to do
intake.soft_cap_warning: Long input ({bytes} bytes) — that's good. Continue if you want, or run `agora` again to refine.
intake.hard_cap_truncated: Input was {bytes} bytes — truncated to 16 KB. The truncated text is what was captured.
intake.echo: OK. Captured {word_count} words via {method}. Estimated rounds to seed lock: {estimated_rounds}.

resume.suggest_new: No project state found in this folder. Run `agora new <name>` to start, or `agora doctor` to verify the environment.
resume.next_phase_minus_1: Next: `agora bracket` — run Husserl Phase −1 (greenfield default).
resume.next_intake_desc: Phase 1 open intake — collect raw context
resume.intake_done: Phase 1 intake captured (alignment.phase = 1). Ready for Phase 2 telos round.
resume.next_phase_2_telos: Next: `agora telos` — Aristotle telos round (Phase 2, round 1).
resume.next_telos_desc: Run Aristotle telos round (3 questions, ≤2 LLM calls)
resume.telos_done: Telos captured (Phase 2 round 1). Ready for form round (round 2).
resume.next_phase_2_form: Next: `agora form` — Aristotle form round (Phase 2, round 2).
resume.next_form_desc: Run Aristotle form round (essential structure + irreducible parts)
resume.form_done: Form captured (Phase 2 round 2). Ready for material round (round 3).
resume.next_phase_2_material: Next: `agora material` — Aristotle material round (Phase 2, round 3).
resume.next_material_desc: Run Aristotle material round (tech stack + data shape + infrastructure)
resume.material_done: Material captured (Phase 2 round 3). Ready for efficient round (round 4).
resume.next_phase_2_efficient: Next: `agora efficient` — Aristotle efficient round (Phase 2, round 4 — final).
resume.next_efficient_desc: Run Aristotle efficient round (who + when + how)
resume.efficient_done: All 4 Aristotle causes captured (Phase 2 complete). Plato Y2 maturity tagging pending.
resume.alignment_runtime_pending: Phase {phase} runtime is not yet implemented in this build.
resume.next_alignment_runtime_desc: Alignment runtime for this phase will land in a future slice
resume.deferred_phase: Phase `{phase}` recognized — downstream implementation pending. Follow-up: {follow_up}.
resume.deferred_follow_up_desc: Downstream command for `{phase}` not yet implemented
